---
title: "The Rev. George Augustus Seymour"
---

## The Rev. George Augustus Seymour

**Dates:** (1828/9-1909)

### Description

Rector of Holy Trinity, Winchester

### Biography

He married Elizabeth Welman Noel (d. 1868), whose sister was married to the Ven. Philip Jacob.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
